name: projects/spsstg-ck6l5/locations/us/instances/96356bda-a057-49d1-9692-34b4b2c9c3f6/integrations/SentinelOneV2/jobs/99/jobInstances/52
author: b19600ad-f8ec-46c5-84f3-24955929b4e4
description: This job will synchronize Google SecOps Alerts and SentinelOne alerts. The job synchronizes status. Requires “SentinelOne Alert” tag on the case. Note: If the alert didn’t originate from “Alerts Connector” you will need to add an “Alert_ID” Alert Context Value for the job to be able to find the correct information.
